capabilities_used.evidence: 2026-04-11 推文："$BTC structure is tightening. Price holding above 70K while volatility compresses usually signals expansion building." 这是典型的波动压缩后等扩张的框架。
同一条 BTC 推文继续写："VWAP and moving averages are now supporting from below, turning prior resistance"，说明他会把均线/VWAP 回踩转支撑当作顺势延续信号。
BTC 推文里强调均线和 VWAP 从下方托住价格、前阻力转支撑，本质是关键动态均线收回后的趋势确认。
图片 #2 的 SOL 4h 画了一个明显的圆弧底/杯形底，并配上向上路径；2026-04-11 推文写："SOL has formed a solid base and is on the verge of going parabolic."
他对 SOL、BTC 的表述明显偏向识别强势上行环境再顺势做多，例如 "holding above 70K"、"solid base"、"going parabolic"。
图片 #6 直接使用了 "[BTC] - Binance Whale to Exchange Flow" 图，把鲸鱼流入交易所当作潜在抛压/风险观测指标。
2026-04-11 推文："I have this subtle feeling that we are going to get another huge solana memecoin season very soon"。虽然没直接提 BTC.D，但他的框架明显在捕捉 BTC 之外向 SOL/meme 的轮动。
2026-04-10 推文："TAO is nuking. Any news?!"，配图 #1 是垂直下杀测幅；另有阿语推文提醒 memecoin "but at the same speed it can disappear completely"，说明他知道瀑布行情不能盲接。
2026-04-10 推文："guys will see stocks collapsing, crypto nuking & world war 3 pending and decide to fullport neet"。他经常显式识别高波动、情绪极端环境。
图片 #1 的 TAO 结构是标准的强势下跌阶段：高位横住后直接瀑布，随后低位弱反弹；他会把这种环境单独识别出来。
图片 #7 的 BABY 周线在长期下跌后于低位多次企稳，2026-04-11 推文写："It’s planning to start reversal in between 0.01-0.015$"，说明他会从底部重复测试中找中期反转。
他反复使用 "solid base"、底部圆弧、底部反转区间这类语言和画法。图片 #2、#7 都更像吸筹完成后的启动，而不是单纯追高。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Base Shelf Reversal
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a prolonged downtrend, price stops making meaningful new lows, flattens into a narrow shelf/base, then launches when the shelf breaks upward.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 长期下跌后不再有效创新低，在低位横向筑一个窄平台/货架，平台上破后视为高赔率反转启动。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 #7 的 BABY 从 0.00784 一带长期横住后，他直接给出 0.01-0.015 反转区和更高目标；图片 #2 的 SOL 也是先筑底再预判加速。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Memecoin Holder Quality Filter
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Screen memecoins by sniper ratio, bundled supply, creator share, insider concentration, holder clusters, and early platform-user metrics before taking the trade.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在做 memecoin 之前，先看狙击比例、捆绑持仓、创建者占比、内幕/集群集中度、持有人结构和平台用户等筹码质量指标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 #3 里他直接展示 Bundled 25.3%、Snipers 72.2%、Creator 11.8%、Fresh 7.4%；2026-04-11 的 WLFI 推文还写了 "doesn't have snipers... top holders... bubblemap cluster"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Narrative Leader Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify the coin or subnet most likely to become the leader of a fresh narrative after a catalyst, then front-run the rotation before broad market recognition.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在新催化出现后，优先寻找最可能成为该叙事龙头的标的，并在市场广泛认知前提前埋伏轮动。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-04-10 推文："there's clear opportunity post-templar to be the king subnet on $tao... is @ridges_ai the next $100M subnet"，这是典型的催化后叙事龙头押注。

personal_quirks.quote: SOL has formed a solid base and is on the verge of going parabolic. And guys are still waiting for $40 🤣
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 看到扎实底部后，他倾向于提前站在加速前，而不是等极端回撤价位。

personal_quirks.quote: $BTC structure is tightening. Price holding above 70K while volatility compresses usually signals expansion building.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他把高位缩波 + 关键位不破视为下一段趋势扩张前的蓄势。

personal_quirks.quote: guys will see stocks collapsing, crypto nuking & world war 3 pending and decide to fullport neet
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他把宏观恐慌期满仓梭哈看成典型反模式，至少口头上警惕情绪化 all-in。

personal_quirks.quote: It’s planning to start reversal in between 0.01-0.015$ and then it could reach 0.08-0.1$ in long term hold
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他喜欢先框定反转带，再给出远得多的弹性目标，交易表达偏赔率导向。

personal_quirks.quote: I have this subtle feeling that we are going to get another huge solana memecoin season very soon
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 除了图表，他会用叙事/情绪周期去提前押注下一轮 Solana meme 轮动。

unique_traits: 他不是纯粹的教科书 TA 交易员，而是把简化图形识别、叙事轮动和土狗筹码筛选混在一起用。图表表达非常直给，常用“solid base”“parabolic”“season”这类高 beta 词汇，把 setup 讲成可传播的内容。与很多只做 BTC/ETH 的 TA 号不同，他明显偏爱 Solana 生态、低市值 meme 和叙事龙头抢跑。

high_conviction_phrases: on the verge of going parabolic
the ultimate bot just doesn’t miss
the only crypto a serious investor can allocate towards is $btc and $hype
I WILL MAKE A CALL TOMORROW!
